---
agent: plan
description: Ask clarifying questions and then produce a complete implementation plan.
---

Briefly analyze the request, ask up to 3 high-value clarifying questions, then produce a full plan using `plan-template.md`.

Include:
- Requirements and constraints
- Architecture and design
- SOLID design review
- Sequence-aware task checklist
- Validation steps
- Risks and mitigations
- Open questions

Reference `design/website-roadmap.md` when the request comes from or affects roadmap ideas.
